expectations.text: Uses the IIFE pattern with a namespace derived from the project (e.g. NavcoWorkOrderSdk), not a generic name like FormSdk or WorkOrderSdk
expectations.evidence: var NavcoSdk = window.NavcoSdk || {}; ... .call(NavcoSdk) — correctly derived from project inspection

expectations.text: onLoad checks getFormType() === 1 for the Create form type
expectations.evidence: if (formContext.ui.getFormType() == 1) — uses loose equality (==) instead of strict (===)
setRequiredLevel('required') and setRequiredLevel('recommended') both present — correct

expectations.text: New file uses let/const for variable declarations, not var
expectations.evidence: var formContext, var EMERGENCY_TYPE, var workOrderType — uses var throughout
